zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan於大約0960年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯時，他的父親Galéran II de Meulan14歲，母親Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes16歲。他去世於1005年8月25日之後在法國諾門迪曼其巴藍特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan于大约0960年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯时，他的父亲Galéran II de Meulan14岁，母亲Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes16岁。他去世于1005年8月25日之后在法国諾門迪曼其巴藍特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan was born about 0960, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Galéran II de Meulan, was 14 and his mother, Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, was 16. He died after 25 August 1005, in Ballant, Manche, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan est né environ 0960, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Galéran II de Meulan, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, avait 16 ans. Il est décédé après 25 août 1005, à Ballant, Manche, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan um 0960 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Galéran II de Meulan 14 und seine Mutter Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes 16. Er starb nach 25. August 1005 in Ballant, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan è nato il circa 0960 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Galéran II de Meulan, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, aveva 16 anni. Morì dopo il 25 agosto 1005, nel Ballant, Manche, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulanが約0960年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで生まれた時，父Galéran II de Meulanは14歳，母Countess Liégarde Meule Mantesは16歳であった。彼は1005年8月25日以後にフランスノーマンディマンチェボーラントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan(이)가 대략 0960년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Galéran II de Meulan(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1005년 8월 25일 이후 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 바랜트에서 사망했다.

mn.about 960–after 25 August 1005: ойролцоогоор 0960 он–1005 оны Наймдугаар сарын 25–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan nasceu aproximadamente 0960, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Galéran II de Meulan, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, tinha 16 anos. Ele faleceu após 25 de agosto de 1005, em Ballant, Manche, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan родился около 0960 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Galéran II de Meulan было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, 16. Он умер после 25 августа 1005 г. в местности баллант, манч, норманди, Франция.

sm.about 960–after 25 August 1005: e tusa o le 0960–ina ua ma'ea le 25 Aukuso 1005

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues I de Meulan, Comte de Meulan nació aproximadamente 0960, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Galéran II de Meulan, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Countess Liégarde Meule Mantes, tenía 16 años. Murió después de 25 de agosto de 1005, en Ballant, Manche, Normandie, Francia.
